suite.name: Cenario06 Gerenciamento Status & Cenario09 Calculo Valor

kw.name: Abrir O Sistema Com Dados Limpos
New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": false, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "D:\\Download\\Aluguel-de-equipamentos\\Aluguel-de-equipamentos\\results\\browser\\traces\\temp\\79060fa7-a8e7-47c6-bafe-9077f197765e"}
Starting Browser process C:\Users\drago\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\Lib\site-packages\Browser\wrapper\index.js using at 127.0.0.1:62106

Successfully created browser with options: {"browser":"chromium","headless":false,"chromiumSandbox":false,"devtools":false,"handleSIGHUP":true,"handleSIGINT":true,"handleSIGTERM":true,"slowMo":0,"timeout":30000,"tracesDir":"D:\\Download\\Aluguel-de-equipamentos\\Aluguel-de-equipamentos\\results\\browser\\traces\\temp\\79060fa7-a8e7-47c6-bafe-9077f197765e"}
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.

kw.name: New Page
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: http://localhost/Aluguel-de-equipamentos/public/index.html
No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.
kw.doc: Open a new Page.

kw.name: Evaluate JavaScript
kw.msg: JavaScript executed successfully.
kw.doc: Executes given javascript on the selected element(s) or on page.

kw.name: Reload
kw.msg: Reloaded page with options: {"waitUntil": "load"}
kw.doc: Reloads current active page.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector id=login-card at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'admin' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text 'admin123' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'id=btn-login-submit'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector id=page-title at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'css=.nk-menu-item[data-page="equipamentos"] .nk-menu-link'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector id=page-equipamentos at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'css=button[onclick="abrirModalStatus('eq-001')"]'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector id=modal-status-equipamento at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Select Options By
kw.msg: Selects the option(s) manutencao by attribute SelectAttribute.value from element id=status-eq-novo.
kw.doc: Selects options from select element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'css=#modal-status-equipamento .modal-footer .btn-primary'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=.toast-item.toast-success:has-text("Status alterado") at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.msg: Closed browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

kw.name: Get Current Date
kw.doc: Returns current local or UTC time with an optional increment.

kw.doc: Adds time to date and returns the resulting date.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'css=.nk-menu-item[data-page="reservas"] .nk-menu-link'.
kw.doc: Simulates mouse click on the element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector id=page-reservas at state visible

kw.name: Click
kw.msg: Clicks the element 'css=#page-reservas button[onclick="abrirModalNovaReserva()"]'.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector id=modal-nova-reserva at state visible

kw.name: Select Options By
kw.msg: Selects the option(s) c-001 by attribute SelectAttribute.value from element id=sel-cliente-reserva.

kw.name: Select Options By
kw.msg: Selects the option(s) eq-001 by attribute SelectAttribute.value from element id=sel-equip-reserva.
kw.doc: Selects options from select element found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Fill Text
kw.msg: Fills the text '2026-06-09' in the given field.
kw.doc: Clears and fills the given ``txt`` into the text field found by ``selector``.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns text attribute of the element found by ``selector``.

kw.msg: Closed browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
